name: Skillsoft Corp.
summary: We were originallyincorporated in Delaware on April 11, 2019 under the name Hornblower Acquisition Corp. Our name was changed to Churchill Capital Corp II on June 26, 2019, and to Skillsoft Corp. on June 11, 2021 (upon completion of our business combination with Software Luxembourg Holding S.A.). OVERVIEW Skillsoftempowers organizations and learners to unlock their full potential by delivering personalized, interactive learning experiences and enterprise-ready solutions.
